# Elementary State of Mind

> Beautiful, engaging digital resources for elementary teachers and educators.

## About

Elementary State of Mind provides high-quality, classroom-tested digital resources for elementary teachers. From novel studies and mock trial lessons to ELA anchor charts and essay writing frameworks, our products are designed to save teachers time while inspiring student engagement.

## Content

- **Blog Posts**: Teaching tips, classroom stories, and educator insights on evidence-based practices, engagement strategies, and classroom management
- **Digital Resources**: Ready-to-use lesson plans, worksheets, bundles, and classroom decor available on Teachers Pay Teachers
- **Products**: Novel study bundles, mock trial materials, writing frameworks (OREO, CER, RACES), anchor charts, and assessment tools
- **Gallery**: Classroom photos and student work examples from real teaching experiences

## Featured Resources

- Space Case Complete Novel Study & PBL: Ultimate bundle combining mock trial with assessment
- Space Case Mock Trial: Immersive courtroom experience for novel studies
- Any Text Debate Prep Tool: Evidence-based reasoning using CER, OREO, and RACES frameworks
- ELA Anchor Charts: Hand-drawn, student-friendly charts for interactive notebooks

## Audience

- Elementary teachers (grades 3-8)
- Special education and ELL specialists
- Teacher leaders and curriculum coordinators
- Homeschool educators

## Contact

Find us on Teachers Pay Teachers: https://www.teacherspayteachers.com/store/elementary-state-of-mind

Visit our blog and shop at https://elementary-state-of-mind.com
